name: puttyu
description: Connect Codex to a scoped puttyU instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped puttyU tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to puttyU through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so puttyU Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use puttyU only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
